name: Sardine Fraud and Compliance API
what_it_does: Sardine fraud and compliance platform REST API for fintechs, neobanks, crypto exchanges, and financial services to detect fraud using device intelligence, behavioral biometrics, and AI-powered risk scoring at account opening and transaction level. Enables AI agents to manage device fingerprinting and session tracking for account takeover detection automation, handle behavioral biometric analysis for synthetic identity and fraud detection automation, access real-time risk score computation for account opening fraud prevention automation, retrieve transaction risk scoring for payment fraud detection automation, manage AML transaction monitoring rules for financial crime compliance automation, handle consortium data and shared fraud network intelligence for cross-institution fraud prevention automation, access crypto-specific fraud detection for exchange and wallet fraud prevention automation, retrieve continuous session monitoring for bot and scripted attack detection automation, manage custom rule engine and risk threshold configuration for fraud policy automation, and integrate Sardine with identity verification, payments, and core banking platforms for end-to-end fraud prevention.
use_cases: Detecting account fraud from behavioral biometrics automation agents
Preventing crypto fraud from exchange risk scoring agents
Monitoring AML from transaction compliance agents
Blocking bots from session intelligence automation agents
not_for: Sanctions and PEP screening (use ComplyAdvantage or Refinitiv World-Check)
Credit decisioning and bureau-based fraud (use Experian or Equifax)
Document and identity verification (use Jumio or Onfido)
best_when: A fintech, neobank, or crypto exchange wanting AI agents to automate behavioral biometric fraud detection, device intelligence-based account fraud prevention, real-time transaction risk scoring, and AML compliance monitoring within Sardine's integrated fraud and compliance platform.
avoid_when: BEHAVIORAL BIOMETRIC DATA CCPA AND GDPR CLASSIFICATION: Behavioral biometric data (typing patterns, mouse movements, touch dynamics) may constitute biometric data under CCPA and BIPA (Illinois Biometric Information Privacy Act); automated behavioral biometric collection via Sardine must comply with biometric data consent requirements in applicable jurisdictions; automated biometric collection without required consent creates BIPA class action exposure. DEVICE FINGERPRINTING EU COOKIE AND EPRIVACY COMPLIANCE: Sardine device fingerprinting involves browser and device data collection; EU ePrivacy Directive and GDPR consent requirements apply to device fingerprinting for EU users; automated Sardine SDK deployment on EU-facing applications must implement consent management before device fingerprinting activation. RULE ENGINE CHANGE MANAGEMENT FOR PAYMENT BLOCKING: Sardine rule engine can block transactions in real-time; automated rule changes that tighten fraud thresholds without QA testing create false positive payment blocking for legitimate customers; implement rule change testing with historical transaction datasets before production deployment.

auth.notes: Sardine uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON and mobile/web SDKs. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2020 by Soups Ranjan, Aditya Goel, and Hari Raghavan. Private (~$75M raised, a16z, Nyca Partners, XYZ Ventures). Fraud prevention for crypto and fintech. Behavioral biometrics, device intelligence, and AI risk scoring. AML transaction monitoring. Consortium fraud network. Crypto exchange fraud specialization. Competes with SEON, Unit21, Feedzai, and Sift for fintech fraud prevention.

pricing.paid_tiers: Usage-based subscription per scored transaction; AML and device intelligence modules; enterprise pricing for high-volume fintechs
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Private (~$75M raised). Usage-based per transaction. AML module add-on. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; transaction scoring queries throttled; webhooks for risk alert events

known_agent_gotchas: BEHAVIORAL BIOMETRICS SDK IMPLEMENTATION REQUIRED FOR SIGNALS: Sardine behavioral biometric fraud detection requires client-side SDK integration (web or mobile); automated risk scoring API calls without behavioral biometric data from Sardine SDK returns degraded risk score; implement Sardine web/mobile SDK alongside API integration to provide full behavioral signal for fraud scoring

SESSION TOKEN LIFECYCLE MANAGEMENT FOR DEVICE INTELLIGENCE: Sardine session tracking uses session tokens created at session start; automated transaction scoring must maintain session token continuity from account authentication to transaction submission; broken session token chain creates incomplete device intelligence and degraded fraud score accuracy

CRYPTO FRAUD TYPOLOGY SPECIFICITY FOR EXCHANGE USE CASES: Sardine crypto fraud detection includes crypto-specific typology models; automated risk scoring for crypto withdrawal and exchange operations should use crypto-specific risk model endpoints rather than generic transaction scoring; generic transaction scoring for crypto operations misses crypto-specific fraud patterns (chain hop, mixing service usage)

RISK SCORE CALIBRATION FOR APPROVAL RATE TARGETING: Sardine risk score threshold for automated transaction blocking affects both fraud prevention and legitimate transaction approval rate; automated threshold calibration must balance fraud prevention with false positive cost; automated blocking at uncalibrated threshold creates excessive customer friction from legitimate transaction decline

CONSORTIUM DATA ENRICHMENT LATENCY: Sardine consortium fraud network data enrichment adds value to risk scoring but has slight latency vs non-consortium scoring; automated real-time payment authorization with strict latency SLA must benchmark Sardine consortium-enriched scoring latency against payment gateway timeout requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Fraud prevention. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. API key. US/EU. Transaction data, behavioral biometrics, device intelligence, and risk scores.

security_score_components.security_notes: Fraud prevention. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. API key. US/EU. Transaction, biometric, device, and risk data.
